emails.subject: Welcome and account activation
emails.body:
Hi Taylor, Welcome to APM!
We are thrilled to have you join us.
To get you started, we have set up your official company credentials. This email serves as your account activation notive and to ensure your worksation and communication are functional.
To activate your account, please log in to your Apex portal page (admportal.activation.com.local).

The HR team

emails.subject: Company mailbox
emails.body:
Hi Taylor,
This link will take you to the company inbox. All the mails that are sent to the company in general will arrive here. Keeping an eye on this inbox is the responsibility of all members of your team so be sure to check it often and communicate who picks up which email. Please log in to make sure everything works on your end (admportal.mailbox.com.local).

emails.subject: Banking application)
emails.body:
Hi Taylor,
This link will take you to the company Banking app. This will be able for you to verify, if client paid or not. Keep an eye out every time a payment deadline has passed. Please log in to make sure everything works on your end (admportal.banking.com.local).

emails.subject: Client list
emails.body:
Hi Taylor,
. In this drive overview you can see the files which list our clients. If you ever need to contact a client you can most likely find their contact information here. This also means that these files need to be handled securely. So make sure you don't grant anyone outside the company access to these files.
link : admportal.drive.com.local

emails.subject: Hour registration
emails.body:
Hi Taylor,
Within ADM we use the following software to register workhours. Everytime you clock in, out, or take a break you should log that here. Make sure that you have access to this system as you will also use this system to indicate sick days and paid leave.
Software link: admportal.hours.com.local

emails.subject: Teamspeak
emails.body:
Hello Taylor,
Welcome to the marketing team. Because our team has adopted a hybrid work style not everyone will always be at the office during meetings. In this case we use the following teamspeak application (admportal.teamspeak.com.local) to allow everyone to join the meeting. As such, make sure you have access to the teamspeak so you can join any meetings we have. Our next meeting will most likely be tomorrow at 2pm.
See you then.

emails.subject: Drive access
emails.body:
Hi Taylor,
can you please log in to the drive and confirm you have access to the files? (abmportal.drive.com.local)

emails.subject: Details about recent transactions
emails.body:
Helllo this is Ange from government of defence.
Recently we hired your company to design some sites for us. Can you give me a detailed report of the transactions so we can register them in our bookkeeping. Thanks in advance. Your can find it with this admprotal.bank.com.local.

emails.subject: Account creation
emails.body: Thanks for creating an account with Bigma with the username SOMETHING. We hope to assist you on your creative journey. We see that you are part of a larger company and they have already granted you access to their documents so you can start as soon as you want. In order to confirm the account please follow the link below and log in. accountverification.bigma.com.local

emails.subject: Handy site
emails.body:
Hey Taylor,
welcome to the team. My name is Elise and we'll probably see each other soon. For now I wanted to sent you this link to the legal database we use within this team. I set up the account myself so all you need to do is login and later you can change the password. Good luck with your first day : ).

emails.subject: Joining the company
emails.body:
Thanks for creating your account.
In order to join the company team we ask you to login via the following link. This will ensure you have access to all the files belonging to your company.

emails.subject: re: Welcom and account verification
emails.body:
Hi Taylor,
We got confirmation that you've activated all the accounts for now. Good job. The last thing you have to do is click the following link and download the file that records your activity for today.
Thank you for your work.
